IT was still higher overall, though it dropped slightly from the year 1994 to 1996. However, over the following four years, the patterns of the two components were not easily different. The percentage of GDP from IT increased quite sharply to 12 in the year 1998, then nearly 15 in the year 2000. On the other hand, the service industry remained nearly the same.
